examples.title: Work Calculation
examples.content: Force 20 N. Displacement 5 m in same direction. Work = 20·5 = 100 J. Vectors pointing same way: dot product is positive.

examples.title: Perpendicular Force
examples.content: Push a box 10 m north. Gravity pulls down with 50 N. Gravity·Displacement = 0 (perpendicular). Gravity does no work!

examples.title: Projection
examples.content: Vector A (5,0). Vector B (3,4). A·B/(|A|)=projection of B onto A = 3. Shows how much B points in A's direction.
